vectors.name: initiator-both-directions
vectors.description: The initiator signs the receipt content bound to its own fingerprint and initiator role: the agreed-terms hash, the two directional session-keyed payload MACs (initiator->responder and responder->initiator, here fixed stand-in values), and the initiator-role binder. Any implementation seeded identically and given this session key and content must reproduce the fingerprint, the binder, and the Ed25519 signature.

vectors.name: responder-distinct-identity
vectors.description: The responder signs the same directional content bound to its own fingerprint and responder role (both parties key the two directions identically). Uses the same session key but a distinct identity; its role names the responder-role binder derivation to pin that label too. That responder-role binder is a derivation not produced in a live exchange, where both parties fold in the initiator-role binder -- the vector pins the label for cross-implementation coverage.
